label: Wheeltop EDS
description: Connect to Wheeltop EDS wireless electronic groupsets via BLE. Display gear information, battery levels, shift counts, and drivetrain visuals on your Karoo. Toggle Race Mode from the ride screen.
releaseNotes:
* Fix stale device data when switching between RDs
* Fix phantom +1 front shift count on first rear shift
* Fix shift count not updating during ride
* Fix device reconnection after disable/enable
